label_notes: Source: training knowledge (2026-03-20). WebFetch blocked due to network egress restrictions. 23andMe is heavily regulated under HIPAA and various state genetic privacy laws. Note that data sharing practices vary significantly based on user consent selections, particularly around research participation. VERIFY all claims against current live policy before publication.
